action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 8 finished training successfully in ~2 hours (7120s) for 15M timesteps with the enhanced architecture (512-dim features, [512,256] MLP, 4-frame stack, n_steps=4096). No evaluation score is available yet for this checkpoint. Analysis: I need to measure whether the increased capacity, frame stacking, and longer training improved upon the 44.2% success rate from iter_6. Given ~7 hours remain, the result will determine whether to train even longer, tune hyperparameters, or try a different algorithm. Decision: Submit evaluation immediately for the iter_8 checkpoint without code changes to validate the new model.
